description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New (Published: June 1, 2026)

Book lending is now starting at the Fujimi and Naguiri district administrative centers, using books transferred from the library branch.

Please feel free to use this service.

Lending dates: On days when the center is open

Lending hours: 9:00 AM to 4:30 PM

You can also use the Hanno City Library book delivery service.

For details, please contact the administrative center counter.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/gyoseicenterkanrika/fujimichikugyoseicenter_kominkan/13584.html
summary: ℹ️ Book lending now available at Fujimi and Naguり district administrative centers
